CustomField.description: Set the log level for which a Log Event will be forwarded to an OpenTelemetry (OTLP/HTTP) logs endpoint. Whenever a Log Event is created and the level of the event is encompassed by the currently set OTel Log Level, the event is forwarded. Otherwise, it is skipped. Requires the RFLIB_OTEL_LOGS Named Credential.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set the log level for which a Log Event will be forwarded to an OpenTelemetry (OTLP/HTTP) logs endpoint. Requires the RFLIB_OTEL_LOGS Named Credential.
CustomField.label: OTel Log Level
